description_long: This is a single-story modern house surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several large trees and shrubs. The house features a flat roof and a layout with multiple interconnected rooms, visible through large windows and glass doors. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a small pool or pond in the backyard, and a mix of paved and grassy areas. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows providing ample natural light. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessible via a paved path, and is partially obscured by landscaping. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped yard enclosed by a wooden fence. Features include a garage, driveway, and a small backyard pool or pond.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, and a clear view of the pool or pond in the backyard, with dense trees along the fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage doors, and trash bins, with more trees and shrubs visible along the fence line.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool or pond, and the back facade of the house with large windows and open grassy areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the pool or pond, with the entryway less visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a paved path, partially obscured by landscaping, and no prominent porch or columns
